MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-24-2024 IN 206 -- APPEARANCES BY NEIL J. BERRY, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF LESLY GERALDINE GUTIERREZ; DEMIAN M. CASEY, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.; IRINA DMITRIYEV, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT NOEL BARTOLOME; JEFFREY WOO, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT MAHAMMED ALI SALEH AL HUQABI -- DEFENDANT LYFT'S INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/13/24 IS CONTINUED TO 6/3/24 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES OF THE TRIAL DATE ABSENT GOOD CAUSE. DISCOVERY AS REFLECTED ON THE STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. ALL PARTIES MUST EMAIL ADRCOORDINATOR@SFTC.ORG NO LATER THAN SIX WEEKS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE TO SET A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH THE COURT. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
